label: OpenAI
description: Connect to OpenAI's API to use GPT models, embeddings, DALL-E image generation, and Whisper speech-to-text.

form.title: Connect OpenAI
form.subtitle: Paste your OpenAI API key to enable GPT, embeddings, DALL-E, and Whisper.

methods.label: API Key
methods.description: Paste a secret API key from platform.openai.com. Takes 30 seconds — no OAuth setup required. Optionally scope the key to a specific organization or project.
methods.how_to:
## Generate an OpenAI API Key

1. Open [platform.openai.com](https://platform.openai.com) and sign in.
2. Click your profile icon in the top-right corner → **Your profile**.
3. Go to **API Keys** in the left sidebar (or navigate directly to [platform.openai.com/api-keys](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)).
4. Click **+ Create new secret key**.
5. Give the key a name like `Anton` so you can identify it later.
6. (Optional) Restrict the key to a specific **Project** using the project dropdown.
7. Click **Create secret key** — the key is shown **once**. Copy it immediately.
8. Paste the key (it starts with `sk-`) into the **API Key** field below.

## Organization & Project IDs (optional)

- If your account belongs to multiple organizations, find your **Organization ID** under **Settings → Organization → General** (looks like `org-...`). Leave blank to use your default org.
- If you use OpenAI Projects, find the **Project ID** under **Settings → Projects → [your project] → General** (looks like `proj_...`). Leave blank to use the default project.

## Notes

- The key is shown once. If you lose it, delete the old key and generate a new one — Anton makes this easy to update.
- Usage and rate limits are tied to your account tier. Check [platform.openai.com/usage](https://platform.openai.com/usage) to monitor consumption.
- Keys can be revoked at any time from the API Keys page without affecting other integrations.

fields.name: api_key
fields.label: API Key
fields.description: Your OpenAI secret API key. Found at platform.openai.com/api-keys — shown only once at creation.

fields.name: organization_id
fields.label: Organization ID
fields.description: Optional. Required only if you belong to multiple organizations. Find it under Settings → Organization → General.

fields.name: project_id
fields.label: Project ID
fields.description: Optional. Scopes API calls to a specific OpenAI Project. Find it under Settings → Projects → [your project] → General.

fields.name: base_url
fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: Optional. Override only if using a custom proxy or Azure OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Leave blank to use the default OpenAI API.
